arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: First signing travels for medical as Mathys Tel talks continue
arts.sum: Manchester United have a great deal of transfer work to do before the window shuts on Monday night with Mathys Tel, Patrick Dorgu and Marcus Rashford dominating the headlines

arts.ttl: How Alejandro Garnacho worked his way into Ruben Amorim's good books while Marcus Rashford was out in the cold... and the change Kobbie Mainoo has welcomed with open arms
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Mainoo has experienced teething problems adapting to Amorim's demands. He was reinstated to the line-up on Thursday, playing in a different position.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim given brutal Man Utd verdict with two ex-stars in agreement
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has already taken charge of 18 games as Manchester United manager following his move from Sporting Lisbon in mid-November but it hasn't been plain sailing

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer update: Alejandro Garnacho 'enquiry' from new Premier League rival amidst Chelsea, Napoli interest
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly receive a fresh enquiry from a Premier League rival amidst interest from both Napoli and Chelsea, with the Red Devils under pressure to sell.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star addresses £30m Patrick Dorgu transfer and sends Ruben Amorim message
arts.sum: Manchester United are on the verge of completing a deal worth up to £30million for Lecce defender Patrick Dorgu, who'll become the club's first signing under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Aston Villa interested in signing Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: The 27-year-old has fallen out of favour at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign wonderkid as Arsenal and Chelsea get €60m opportunity: FT recap
arts.sum: Mathys Tel has decided to reject a €60m transfer to Tottenham as Arsenal, Chelsea and Man Utd continue to push for him. Man Utd sign wonderkid as Arsenal and Chelsea get €60m opportunity: FT recap
